name: English Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1 large Sugar Free Raspberry Jello (6 serving box)
1 large Packet Instant Vanilla Pudding - Sugar Free
1/2 to 1 cup Dry Sherry - not cooking variety
3 Fresh mint leaves or similar garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Break the Angel Food Cake into medium-sized pieces and spread each piece lightly with Raspberry Jam.
2. Arrange the cake pieces in a straight-sided glass bowl, pour over the Dry Sherry, and weigh down lightly with a saucer. Cover with plastic wrap and set aside for several hours or overnight until the sherry has been absorbed.
3. Mix the Jello according to package directions; do not use ice. Pour the mixture over the cake and sherry in the bowl. Cover and place in the refrigerator for several hours or overnight until the Jello is set.
4. Before serving, prepare the Vanilla Pudding mix and pour it over the Jello layer. Use a knife to slide down the sides of the bowl, allowing some of the pudding to flow down the sides.
5. Cover again and chill once more.
6. Garnish with cherries and mint leaves or use candied holiday fruits to decorate the top of the bowl.
7. When serving, carefully slide a spoon to the bottom of the bowl for each portion, ensuring that each serving gets the flavors from all the layers and the sherry.
8. Top with a small dollop of Cool-Whip Lite.
Note: If you're not concerned about sugar content or calories, use regular jam, jello, and pudding mix instead. This recipe is best served in a straight-sided glass bowl and has been a family favorite for Christmas since my childhood.
